race.comment: LITTLE PINKER (7) went forward last start over 1100m at Mackay and held on well for second, beaten 0.8 lengths. Has the ability to play a significant role. POINT BE (3) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 900m at Roma. Meeting a tougher field but with added fitness she is one of the chief contenders. FOUR LEAF WONDER (6) finished fourth last time out over 1100m at Rockhampton, beaten 1.2 lengths. Sure to be competitive. BUSH BATTLE (9) got off the mark with an impressive maiden win last time out over 1000m at Roma. Kayla Barker was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the mount. One of the likely contenders despite the step up in grade.
